sys_script.description: 2.5 P3 STRY0084306 - TUP - STRETCH - Template form - "Template Subtask Name Setting" - None, Suffix and Prefix STRY0084419 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "None" STRY0084420 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "Suffix" STRY0084424 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "Prefix" STRY0084599 - Need a way for deliver and customers to better synchronize field updates and changes STRY0085136 - TUP - Mapping fields - Template Instance fields must map to "Top Task" and "Subtask(s)" created
sys_script.name: Task - onInsert Copy Template Task
